title: Bounded Workstation Validation Of Packet 023 Test Artifact
objective: Mirror the exact Packet 023 one-file operations-web test artifact into the workstation copy only long enough to run no-install local typecheck and browser-smoke validation, without mutating `/home/olares/code/apex`, publishing changes, installing dependencies, or widening beyond the mirrored test file.
active_role: Olares Workstation Test Artifact Validation Operator
dependency_note: Packet 024 deferred publication or rollback because host-side typecheck and browser-smoke were unavailable under the no-install boundary while the workstation already has the cheaper no-install validation prerequisites. This packet may open only as a workstation-local validation lane and must not mutate the host artifact or publish it.
required_inputs: Packet 023 execution handoff showing the exact one-file host artifact scope
Packet 024 decision handoff naming workstation validation as the next packet
Current local Playwright browser cache availability
constrained_outputs: At most one workstation-local mirrored test-file edit under `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`
A dated execution handoff recording the mirrored diff scope, local validation results, and whether the workstation-local mirror was preserved or reverted after validation
No host mutation, publication commit, install work, package or lockfile mutation, production-source change outside the mirrored test file, runtime mutation, service change, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Reconfirm the Packet 023 host artifact is limited to `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`.
Reconfirm the workstation already has `apps/operations-web/node_modules` and a local Playwright browser cache without install.
Mirror only the exact Packet 023 route-title assertions into the workstation copy of `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`.
Record `git diff --check -- apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` after the mirrored edit.
Record workstation `git status --short` and stop if files outside the mirrored test file and authority surfaces change.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only a bounded workstation-local mirror and validation of the Packet 023 test artifact. It does not authorize database writes, host mutation, publication commits, install work, package changes, production-source changes outside the mirrored test file, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Complete. Packet 025 mirrored only the exact Packet 023 route-title assertions into the workstation copy of `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`; `git diff --check` passed; local `npm exec tsc -- --noEmit` passed; the targeted re-homed browser-surfaces Playwright test passed; and the full `tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` Playwright file passed 3 of 3 tests. Because `pnpm` was unavailable on the shell `PATH`, equivalent no-install local `npm` and direct Playwright binary launchers were used instead. The workstation-local mirrored test diff was preserved after validation to support a later bounded publication packet, while `/home/olares/code/apex` remained untouched.
next_action: Open only the separate Packet 026 publication and host-mirror resync gate to publish the validated Packet 023 one-file test artifact plus the minimal Packet 024 and Packet 025 authority surfaces, then reconcile the matching dirty tracked host file non-destructively. Do not mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone from Packet 025 alone.
